accurate.why: All provisions accurately described with correct deadlines (18 months, 30 months), sections (312A-312D), agencies, and the no-additional-funds clause.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details traceable to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose: cardiomyopathy education, research, AED/CPR in schools.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill amends the Public Health Service Act by adding sections 312A-312D.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the no-additional-funds clause and grant eligibility limited to local educational agencies with qualified health care entities.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states 18-month and 30-month deadlines and December 23, 2024 enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: All four major sections (education materials, CDC activities, NIH research, school AED/CPR grants) thoroughly covered.

concise.why: Very detailed for a summary; includes granular specifics (specific cardiac syndrome names, evidence lifecycle details) that go beyond what a summary typically requires.

correct_entities.why: HHS Secretary, CDC Director, NIH Director, and local educational agencies all correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
